<path>/home/ishanp/Documents/GitHub/igs-mcp/src/config/schemas.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import { z } from 'zod';
2: 
3: export const PoolSchema = z.object({
4:   id: z.string().min(1),
5:   name: z.string().min(1),
6:   description: z.string().optional(),
7:   is_active: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
8: });
9: 
10: export const PoolsFileSchema = z.object({
11:   pools: z.array(PoolSchema),
12: });
13: 
14: export const SourceSchema = z.object({
15:   id: z.string().min(1),
16:   name: z.string().min(1),
17:   type: z.enum(['rss', 'http']),
18:   url: z.string().url(),
19:   headers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
20:   parser: z.string().optional(),
21:   parserConfig: z
22:     .object({
23:       listUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
24:       selectors: z
25:         .object({
26:           item: z.string().min(1),
27:           title: z.string().optional(),
28:           link: z.string().optional(),
29:           date: z.string().optional(),
30:           desc: z.string().optional(),
31:         })
32:         .optional(),
33:     })
34:     .optional(),
35:   pools: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
36:   countries: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
37:   cities: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
38:   domains: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
39:   is_active: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
40:   sourceCategory: z.enum(['news', 'community', 'research']).optional().default('news'),
41: });
42: 
43: export const SourcesFileSchema = z.object({
44:   sources: z.array(SourceSchema),
45: });
46: 
47: export const SettingsSchema = z.object({
48:   http: z.object({
49:     userAgent: z.string().default('IGS-MCP/0.1'),
50:     timeoutMs: z.number().int().min(1000).default(15000),
51:     retries: z.number().int().min(0).max(5).default(2),
52:     backoffBaseMs: z.number().int().min(100).default(500),
53:     backoffFactor: z.number().min(1).default(2.0),
54:     concurrency: z.number().int().min(1).max(16).default(6),
55:     perHost: z.number().int().min(1).max(8).default(2),
56:   }),
57:   cache: z.object({
58:     enabled: z.boolean().default(true),
59:     dir: z.string().default('cache'),
60:     honorEtags: z.boolean().default(true),
61:     ttlMs: z.number().int().min(60000).default(30 * 60 * 1000),
62:     queryTtlMs: z.number().int().min(60000).default(10 * 60 * 1000),
63:     maxItemsPerSource: z.number().int().min(50).default(300),
64:   }),
65:   time: z.object({
66:     timezone: z.enum(['local']).default('local'),
67:   }),
68:   tavily: z.object({
69:     enabled: z.boolean().default(false),
70:     apiKey: z.string().optional(),
71:     searchDepth: z.enum(['basic', 'advanced', 'fast', 'ultra-fast']).default('basic'),
72:     defaultTopic: z.enum(['general', 'news', 'finance']).default('general'),
73:     timeoutMs: z.number().int().min(1000).default(30000),
74:   }).optional(),
75:   firecrawl: z.object({
76:     enabled: z.boolean().default(false),
77:     apiKey: z.string().optional(),
78:     timeoutMs: z.number().int().min(1000).default(60000),
79:     defaultFormats: z.array(z.enum(['markdown', 'html', 'screenshot', 'links'])).default(['markdown']),
80:   }).optional(),
81: });
82: 
83: export type PoolsFile = z.infer<typeof PoolsFileSchema>;
84: export type SourcesFile = z.infer<typeof SourcesFileSchema>;
85: export type Settings = z.infer<typeof SettingsSchema>;

(End of file - total 85 lines)
</content>

input.oldString:
export const SourceSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().min(1),
  name: z.string().min(1),
  type: z.enum(['rss', 'http']),
  url: z.string().url(),
  headers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
  parser: z.string().optional(),
  parserConfig: z
    .object({
      listUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
      selectors: z
        .object({
          item: z.string().min(1),
          title: z.string().optional(),
          link: z.string().optional(),
          date: z.string().optional(),
          desc: z.string().optional(),
        })
        .optional(),
    })
    .optional(),
  pools: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  countries: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  cities: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  domains: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  is_active: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
  sourceCategory: z.enum(['news', 'community', 'research']).optional().default('news'),
});
input.newString:
export const SourceSchema = z.object({
  id: z.string().min(1),
  name: z.string().min(1),
  type: z.enum(['rss', 'http', 'social_media']),
  url: z.string().url(),
  headers: z.record(z.string(), z.string()).optional(),
  parser: z.string().optional(),
  parserConfig: z
    .object({
      listUrl: z.string().url().optional(),
      selectors: z
        .object({
          item: z.string().min(1),
          title: z.string().optional(),
          link: z.string().optional(),
          date: z.string().optional(),
          desc: z.string().optional(),
        })
        .optional(),
    })
    .optional(),
  pools: z.array(z.string()).default([]),
  countries: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  cities: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  domains: z.array(z.string()).optional().default([]),
  is_active: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
  platform: z.enum(['reddit', 'twitter', 'web']).optional(),
  tier: z.union([z.literal(1), z.literal(2), z.literal(3)]).optional(),
  rate_limit: z
    .object({
      interval_seconds: z.number().int().positive(),
      batch_size: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
    })
    .optional(),
  sourceCategory: z.enum(['news', 'community', 'research', 'social']).optional().default('news'),
});

input.content:
# IGS Source Expansion — Learnings

## Task: Add `platform`, `tier`, `rate_limit` to Source type/schema

### Files Modified
- `src/types/news.ts` — Source type updated
- `src/config/schemas.ts` — SourceSchema updated

### Changes Made

#### Source type changes:
- `type` expanded: `'rss' | 'http'` → `'rss' | 'http' | 'social_media'`
- `sourceCategory` expanded: `'news' | 'community' | 'research'` → `'news' | 'community' | 'research' | 'social'`
- New field: `platform?: 'reddit' | 'twitter' | 'web'`
- New field: `tier?: 1 | 2 | 3`
- New field: `rate_limit?: { interval_seconds: number; batch_size?: number }`

#### SourceSchema changes:
- `type` enum expanded similarly with z.enum
- `platform`: `z.enum(['reddit', 'twitter', 'web']).optional()`
- `tier`: `z.union([z.literal(1), z.literal(2), z.literal(3)]).optional()`
- `rate_limit`: `z.object({ interval_seconds: z.number().int().positive(), batch_size: z.number().int().positive().optional() }).optional()`
- `sourceCategory` enum expanded + kept `optional().default('news')`

### Key Decisions
- All new fields are OPTIONAL — backward compatible with existing sources.yml
- `platform` defaults to undefined (backward compat implied as 'web' at usage time)
- `tier` defaults to undefined (implied Tier 2 at usage time)
- `rate_limit` entirely optional — no rate limiting unless explicitly configured
- Placed new fields between `is_active` and `sourceCategory` in both type and schema

### Build Result
- `bun run build` passes with zero errors
